description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the currently formalized hardcoded_port_or_resource subpatterns. Use this file to build a candidate set before applying the verdict-layer subpattern JSON files.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall; false positives are acceptable at this layer and should be filtered later by manual review plus the verdict-layer subpattern JSON.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions. Prefer recall over precision unless a known noise class causes sibling confusion or unreviewable candidate explosion.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: Treat broad_recall as the default first hop for coarse repository scanning. Use fallback_no_path only when broad_recall is empty, implausibly sparse, or likely to miss due to path/layout drift. Use group_intersection only as an optional lightweight shrinker after recall; it must never be treated as an absence proof or hard gate.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. If broad_recall is empty or implausibly sparse, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding the pattern is absent. A miss in group_intersection should never override a hit from broad_recall/fallback_no_path.

entries.subpattern_key: 本地服务端口必须由 listener/httptest 分配（:0），避免硬编码/伪随机/扫描端口
entries.pattern_file: 本地服务端口必须由_listener_httptest_分配_0_避免硬编码_伪随机_扫描端口.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先抓 `httptest.NewServer` / `net.Listen("tcp", "...:0")` / `tls.Listen("tcp", "...:0")` 这类低噪声端口分配锚点。不要用裸 `rand.Intn` 或裸 `:0` 做第一跳召回；需要覆盖 helper 场景时用 `127.0.0.1:0` + 第二跳（端口消费/提取）做收敛。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳：按低噪声端口分配锚点做粗召回（0 端口 / httptest），覆盖 HTTP/gRPC/TLS/etcd/mock server 常见形态。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当目录结构变化或 broad_recall 过 sparse 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底召回，但仍然只看低噪声端口分配锚点。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳：要求“端口分配锚点出现的文件”里还出现“端口消费/提取锚点”（如 Port/SplitHostPort/server.URL），将候选收敛到更可 review 的集合。

entries.subpattern_key: 临时文件/目录要用 t.TempDir/os.CreateTemp 隔离，避免写死 /tmp 或共享全局 TempDir
entries.pattern_file: 临时文件目录必须_t_TempDir_os_CreateTemp_隔离_避免写死_tmp_共享_TempDir.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳优先抓 `/tmp/`、`os.TempDir()`、`TempStoragePath`、全局 TempDir 读写这些“共享命名空间风险锚点”。`t.TempDir()` 很常见，适合作为“修法锚点”补 recall，但不要单独用它当风险证据。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳：按临时路径/全局 temp 配置锚点做粗召回（既包含风险锚点，也包含常见修法锚点）。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当目录结构变化或 broad_recall 过 sparse 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底召回，但仍然只看临时路径/全局 temp 配置锚点。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳：从包含 temp 锚点的文件中，再筛出包含“真实落地动作”（create/remove/cleanup/exec）的候选，降低纯字符串/expected 值类噪声。

entries.subpattern_key: TiDB mock/server 的 unix socket 路径需唯一（或禁用），避免 /tmp 下冲突
entries.pattern_file: TiDB_mock_server_unix_socket_路径需唯一或禁用_避免_tmp_冲突.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳优先抓 `cfg.Socket =` / `conf.Socket =` 及 `.sock"` 这类更像“socket 文件路径字面量”的锚点；避免用裸 `.sock`（会误命中 `.socketCredUID` 等字段名）。第二跳再用 `NewServer/NewTestConfig/cfg.Port=0` 等锚点确认语境。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳：按 cfg.Socket/conf.Socket 赋值与 `.sock"` 字面量粗召回，快速聚焦到 TiDB server/mock 的 unix socket 配置相关代码。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当目录结构变化或 broad_recall 过 sparse 时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底召回，但仍然只看 socket 配置锚点。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳：只保留“socket 配置文件”里同时出现 `.sock"/{Port}.sock/显式禁用 cfg.Socket=""` 等信号的候选，减少 url/parser/注释噪声。
